name: Aman Deep
shortDesc: Automotive gear oil for heavy-duty transmissions. Superior wear protection and smooth shifting.
description: The Bagani Aman Deep SAE 140 is an automotive gear oil designed for heavy-duty transmissions and differential systems. GL-4 rated for superior wear protection and smooth gear operation.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! Built to handle the toughest gear applications.

features.title: Heavy-Duty Gear Protection
features.desc: SAE 140 viscosity for maximum protection in heavy-load gear systems.

features.title: GL-4 Certified
features.desc: Meets GL-4 standards for manual transmissions and spiral bevel gears.

features.title: Anti-Wear Additives
features.desc: Extreme pressure additives protect gear teeth from scoring and wear.

applications: Equipment requiring SAE 140 GL-4 gear oil

faqs.q: What's the difference between SAE 90 and SAE 140?
faqs.a: SAE 140 is thicker and provides more protection for heavy-duty applications, while SAE 90 is better suited for lighter gear systems.

faqs.q: Can I use gear oil in my engine?
faqs.a: No. Gear oils are formulated specifically for transmissions and differentials. Use Amihan or Laon products for engines.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
